triage_result.summary: Offline emulation indicates good baseline alignment.
top_reasons: Strong Python and API integration experience.
Role scope matches senior engineering profile.
No immediate legal blocker found in offline emulation.

key_risks.risk: Offline fixtures cannot verify current company policy changes.
key_risks.mitigation: Validate latest hiring and entity policy with recruiter.

triage_result.report_markdown:
### Location/Legal Risk
Safe/Unknown for offline emulation.

### Technical Fit
Green Flags:
- Strong Python and API integration experience.
Red Flags:
- Validate exact domain depth for the target role.

### VERDICT: APPLY (Go)

variations.content_for_template: Senior software engineer with strong Python and data platform delivery experience. Builds production-grade APIs and automation workflows with a focus on reliability and measurable business impact. Aligns technical implementation closely with hiring requirements and ATS keyword targets.

- Implemented backend services and integration endpoints that reduced manual support load.
- Optimized SQL queries and indexing strategy to improve dashboard response times.
- Instrumented service-level monitoring and alerting for faster incident detection.
- Deployed CI checks to improve release confidence and code quality.

- Refactored API contracts to simplify downstream consumer integrations.
- Implemented data validation rules that reduced production data quality issues.
- Optimized service workflows to decrease latency and improve throughput.
- Deployed incremental rollout checks in CI/CD to lower deployment risk.

- Implemented scalable data processing pipelines aligned with business SLAs.
- Diagnosed and resolved reliability bottlenecks across key production services.
- Instrumented dashboards and SLO tracking to improve operational visibility.
- Optimized deployment workflow with automated checks and rollback readiness.

I build production Python services and data workflows with a strong focus on reliability and measurable outcomes. My recent work includes API design, observability improvements, and deployment hardening that match the technical needs in your role. I would value the chance to contribute this hands-on engineering approach to your team.
variations.ai_reasoning: Short and specific to technical fit.

variations.content_for_template: I have built backend services and automation workflows with a focus on reliability, delivery discipline, and practical business impact. The combination of Python, API work, and observability improvements in my recent projects maps closely to the problems described in your role. I would be glad to bring that pragmatic engineering approach to your team.

My background is centered on building and improving production systems, from API contracts to CI/CD hardening and operational visibility. That mix of hands-on backend work and reliability-focused delivery is a strong match for the engineering needs in this role. I would welcome the opportunity to contribute that experience in a focused way.
variations.ai_reasoning: More emphasis on infrastructure and CI/CD.

variations.content_for_template: I build production Python services with a strong focus on reliability, observability, and practical outcomes. The work I have done on APIs, deployment hardening, and data workflows aligns well with the core needs of this role. I would be glad to contribute that experience to your team.

# Deep Dive CV Audit

## ATS Match Rate
Estimated match: 84%

## Keyword Gap Analysis
- distributed systems: under-represented
- mentoring: missing explicit evidence

## Hiring Manager Read
Strongest reason: credible Python and reliability delivery experience.
Biggest red flag: not enough explicit scale metrics in recent bullets.

## Actionable Fixes
1. Target section: section_professional_summary - make role fit more explicit.
2. Target section: section_experience_3 - add measurable reliability impact.
3. Target section: section_skills_alignment - reflect JD wording more closely.
4. Target section: section_experience_2 - surface platform ownership.
5. Target section: section_experience_1 - add delivery outcomes.
6. Target section: section_experience_3 - mention observability tooling more explicitly.
7. Target section: section_professional_summary - reduce generic phrasing.
8. Target section: section_skills_alignment - tighten keyword coverage.
variations.ai_reasoning: Grounded audit for offline smoke coverage.
